titleStmt.title: SII 34.207: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 207. Veḷḷanūr, Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the south and east walls of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Agastyēśvara temple.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Māṟavarman Sundarapāṇḍya I, 23rd year = A.D. 1239.

Records an agreement among the ūrār of Veḷḷai-nallūr to conduct the 10-day festival in the month of Chittirai and mentions the names of groups (aḍaiviluḷḷār) of persons like the group of Chembiyaṉ Teṉkarai-nāṭṭu-viḻupparaiyar, the group of Jeyaṅgoṇḍa-vēḷār, etc., responsible to conduct the festival each day.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
māṟapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉa cakkaravattikaḷ cōṇā
ṭu vaḻaṅkiyaruḷi cuntarapāṇṭiya tēvaṟku yāṇṭu
2 10 3 vatu ceyaciṅkakula kāla vaḷanāṭṭut teṉvāyil nāṭṭu veḷḷai nallūr Ūrāyicainta ŪrOm
Eṅkaḷ nāyaṉār tiruvakattīśvara muṭaiya nāyaṉār cittirai cittiraittirunāḷ Eḻuntaruḷuvikkak kaṭavōmākat tirukkai mala
ril nīr vārttu nāṅkaḷ niccayittapaṭi piḷḷaiyār viḻā Ik
kōyil tāṉattār Eḻuntaruḷivikkak kaṭavōmākavum Iraṇ
ṭāntirunāḷ cempiyaṉ teṉkaraināṭṭu viḻupparaiyar raṭaivi
luḷḷārum ceyaṅkoṇṭa vēḷār raṭaiviluḷḷārum meḻuntaru
ḷivikkak kaṭavōmākavum mūṉṟān tirunāḷ kulōttuṅka vēḷā
r Aṭaiviluḷḷārum muṭikoṇṭa vēḷāṉaṭaiviluḷḷārum me
ḻuntaruḷivikka kaṭavōmākavu nāṉkām tirunāḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭa kka
ṉaṭai vēḷāṉaṭaivil Uḷḷā
mpiya ya
kiḻava vēḷā viḻutavēḷār Aṭaiviluḷḷār
Eḻuntaruḷivippōmākavum Āṟān tirunāḷ Irāca kempīra vēḷār Aṭaivil
Uḷḷārum teṉkaraināṭṭu vēḷā riṭaiyil Uḷḷārum Eḻuntaruḷivi
raṭaivi
ppomākavum ṉ ṉāṭṭu kaṇakku mattiyattaṉ mātavaṉ tiruvāḻu
m muṭaiyārir yacōḻa vāyal nāṭṭu mūvēnta veḷḷārruḷ Iṭṭā
r tirukkāya ṉ Eḻuntaruḷivikka kaṭavōmākavum tiruveḻuc muṭi
koṇṭa cōḻanāṭāḻvā ruḷi
yaruḷivittu
r pulāppuṟam
kavum tiruppa
Digital edition of SII 34.207 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
